sections.paragraph:
f. id. Pro 17:1 Psa 122:7 Eze 16:49. Pl. בְּשַׁלְֹותַיִךְ whilst thou wast living securely, Jerem. 22:21 . בְּשַׁלְוָה in (the midst of) security, Dan 8:25 11:21 (compare Job 15:21), i.e. unexpectedly, suddenly, like the Chald. and Syriac בְּשִׁלְיָה, מִן שִׁלְיָה ܡܢܫܠܝ. Compare Dan 11:24.

(2) in a bad sense, carelessness, impiety, Pro 1:32. See שָׁלֵו .
